configurations.name: Docker: Build & Up
configurations.command: docker compose up --build -d && echo '--- Holler Server running at http://localhost:11434 ---' && echo 'Admin UI: http://localhost:11434/admin' && docker compose logs -f jimbomesh-still

configurations.name: Docker: Rebuild (no cache)
configurations.command: docker compose down && docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d && docker compose logs -f jimbomesh-still

configurations.name: Docker: Deploy Code
configurations.command: docker compose build jimbomesh-still && docker compose up -d --force-recreate --no-deps jimbomesh-still && echo '--- Holler Server running at http://localhost:11434 ---' && echo 'Admin UI: http://localhost:11434/admin' && docker compose logs -f jimbomesh-still
